$comment: Source of truth for which (stellar-cli, rust base) pairs we publish. Each stellar-cli release declares its own rust_versions[] at publish time; we do not cross-product. A rust base key joins the rust toolchain version and the upstream rust:<v>-<suffix> tail (e.g. 1.94.0-slim-trixie); see RELEASE.md '## Base image policy' for how the suffix default is chosen. To refresh a rust_image_digest, capture the multi-arch INDEX digest via: docker buildx imagetools inspect rust:<key> --format '{{.Manifest.Digest}}'.
